column1: If you choose to become intoxicated (in any form)
column2: we will be taking your car keys and ask that you camp overnight. This is the case for most people so it isn't a big deal. The road back to town is dark and windy at night and we don't want anyone driving back to town intoxicated and getting into an accident on 4th of July weekend.

column1: It should also be noted that this is a dairy that is in full operation. There are cows
column4: and turkeys. Please do not do anything to the animals or the property that would cause harm. Since there are animals on the property
column7: and random bits of metal about. Please be careful
column9: and bring good shoes. We will have lights setup around certain areas to prevent you from tripping or getting hurt. Thanks!
